summary: The user requested a detailed training plan for a marathon scheduled on April 17, 2023, starting from February 20, 2023. The assistant provided a revised 9-week training plan, adjusting the maximum weekly mileage to 85 miles and correcting previous errors in the plan's duration.
facts: The user has a marathon scheduled for April 17, 2023. The user is currently running 60 miles per week. The user requested a training plan starting from February 20, 2023. The assistant initially provided a 10-week training plan but later corrected it to a 9-week plan. The user requested that the maximum weekly mileage in the training plan be set to 85 miles. The user pointed out that the assistant mistakenly referred to the training plan as a "10-week training plan."
